name: Giant Owl
languages: Celestial; understands Common, Elvish, and Sylvan but can't speak them

features.name: Flyby
features.description: The owl doesn't provoke an Opportunity Attack when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

actions.name: Talons
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d10 + 2) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.description:
The owl casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability:

At Will: Detect Evil and Good, Detect Magic

1/Day: Clairvoyance

tactical_info.combat_role: Scout/Support - Celestial scout with detection magic
tactical_info.positioning: Uses Flyby to avoid opportunity attacks, excellent mobility
tactical_info.damage_output: 7 slashing per hit, modest direct damage
tactical_info.key_abilities: Detect spells reveal hidden threats, Clairvoyance for reconnaissance
tactical_info.weaknesses: Low HP makes it fragile despite celestial resistances
tactical_info.synergies: Perfect for scouting, detecting magical threats, and hit-and-run tactics
